text_block_list.text: Search... The time... is now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm telling you it's another<n>premonition! Today is
the lucky day I<n>uncover the truth behind the
secret<n>spell!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is still trying to<n>learn about
the mysterious piece of<n>paper she found back at
home.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, the student council<n>won't stop us
this time! I already<n>performed a flower divination
as per<n>the teachings of the great Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It says I should borrow a friend's<n>helping hand
for good luck! ...But, uh,<n>after all the trouble I
caused the other<n>day, that might be difficult...

Lo and behold, in your eleventh hour...<n>the sun
itself, in other words, yours<n>truly, has come to
your aid!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, that is if you wish to have<n>companions
along this journey of<n>new discoveries over
yonder!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
M-me too! Fukukitaru, you listened to<n>my
troubles during the karuta<n>tournament... S-so I
want to return the<n>favor!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! You can sit back and relax<n>now that
we're here! I'm great at<n>solving riddles!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: E-everyone...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Is this the ritual diagram? It has some<n>drawings,
a few numbers, and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Chimes, "20," dancer, "3," flowers,<n>"0," and carp...
What does this all<n>mean?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Haaah ha ha! Sounds to me<n>like a
mythos of romance betwixt man<n>and beast!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hark, let this flower bed host mysweet nothings to you, a sound to rivalCupid's chimes! My heartdances for you, even if you are acarp!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, what about the numbers? Like<n>the twenty
and three?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Argh... I don't know... Is there no<n>hope?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Chimes, dancers, flowers, carp... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I got it! These are all back at home!<n>The Shinto
bell, the shrine's kagura<n>hall, flower ornaments,
and the carp<n>pond!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
There is hope after all! So, what do<n>the numbers
mean?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The number of paces to the clue.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I remember now... This... is a treasure<n>map my
big sister made.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It was when I was learning<n>how to write...
She made the map for<n>fun saying it'll help me
learn my<n>numbers.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wait, if I remember correctly, your<n>sister is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, she passed away a long time<n>ago. So long
ago... that my memory's<n>become like this. That's
why—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad! The secret spell helped<n>me
remember my dear sister!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I would've never realized if you all<n>hadn't
helped me! I'd still be running<n>around on a wild
goose chase...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, thank you all! I feel so warm and<n>fuzzy
inside! This is what they call a<n>happy ending,
right?!
choice_data_list: But the treasure still remains a mystery!
But the treasure still remains a mystery!
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, thank you all! I feel so warm and<n>fuzzy
inside! This is what they call a<n>happy ending,
right?!
choice_data_list: But the treasure still remains a mystery!
But the treasure still remains a mystery!
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.
Make sure you keep the map safe from now on.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the finale is yet to come! Let<n>us go forth
and see this to the end!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Yeah! Since we've come this<n>far
together, let's keep pushing<n>forward!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Me and my sister never<n>finished
our treasure hunt.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna look for it by myself,<n>just like
old times!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Good luck! I hope you'll discover<n>something
amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Matikanefukukitaru<n>tells me
that while she still hasn't<n>managed to find the
treasure, she did<n>find a bunch of letters and
maps she<n>exchanged with her sister in those<n>
bygone days.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm never ever gonna forget<n>about it again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, your sister must be really<n>happy to hear
that! I bet she's smiling<n>like you right now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru holds her<n>precious map
tenderly to her chest,<n>her smile as bright as the
sun.
